summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Group Cash Management app. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with excellent user experience and proper role-based access control.

ui_bugs.issue: Confirm password field validation requires user to fill both password fields

passed_tests: Super Admin login with correct credentials
Dashboard loads with proper currency formatting (UGX with commas)
Deposit request submission and admin approval
Loan request (premium members only restriction working)
Members list display with proper member cards
Navigation between all tabs (Overview, Deposits, Loans, Withdrawals, Members, Admin)
